overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxurious cyberpunk apartment from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring Japanese-inspired architecture with dark wood, tatami flooring, and distinctive red glowing coral-like structures. The scene transitions from a dimly lit entrance corridor through a spacious main room with city views, ending at an intimate space with bioluminescent red coral installations.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark entrance corridor with floor accent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a dimly lit corridor with warm floor lighting

entered.detail: tall dark wood paneling covering the corridor walls
continuous warm amber LED strips running along the base of the walls
traditional Japanese-style shoji screen at the corridor end

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, dimly lit corridor with dark wooden walls and warm amber floor lighting. The camera moves forward toward a paper screen door at the end, creating an intimate, enclosed atmosphere typical of high-end cyberpunk residential design.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition walkway with circular viewing window

events.description: circular window with glowing red coral comes into view on the left wall
ambient light increases as the space opens into the main room

agents.ego_description: walking past the circular window while glancing at the red coral installation inside

entered.detail: large circular porthole-style window looking into an adjacent room
bioluminescent red coral-like structure visible through the circular window
dark wooden slat flooring replacing the carpet

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past a distinctive circular window revealing a glowing red coral installation, transitioning from the narrow corridor to a wider walkway with wooden decking. The architecture shifts from enclosed to semi-open as the space begins to expand toward the main living area.

scene_state.functional_zone: main living space with hanging sculpture and city views

events.description: entering the spacious main room with tatami flooring and floor-to-ceiling windows

agents.ego_description: walking through the expansive main room, observing the hanging wooden structure and city views

entered.detail: large sculptural wooden element suspended from the ceiling above a sunken area
tall windows revealing a dark night-time cityscape with distant lights
traditional Japanese tatami mat flooring in the sunken living area

segments.scene_description: The space opens into a grand living area with traditional tatami flooring, a dramatic hanging wooden sculpture, and expansive windows showing the night city. The camera moves through this serene, luxurious environment as the red coral installation remains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: intimate gallery space with bioluminescent coral installation

events.description: approaching the glowing red coral structures, red light becomes dominant
red glow from coral illuminates the immediate surroundings with bioluminescent light

agents.ego_description: approaching the red glowing coral installation, examining the bioluminescent structures up close

entered.detail: transparent glass barrier with subtle lighting along the edge

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the striking red glowing coral installation, transitioning from the open living space to an intimate gallery-like area. The bioluminescent coral casts an intense red glow across the wooden decking and glass railings, creating a surreal, otherworldly atmosphere as the video concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a luxurious cyberpunk residence that transforms from a narrow, dimly lit corridor into a grand, bioluminescent gallery. It begins by gliding through a confined space of dark wooden walls and amber floor lighting toward a paper screen door. As the camera moves forward, the architecture shifts from enclosed to semi-open, passing a circular window that reveals a glimpse of glowing red coral before expanding onto a wide wooden walkway. The scene then opens into a vast living area featuring traditional tatami flooring and a dramatic hanging sculpture, with expansive windows framing the night city skyline. Finally, the camera drifts from the open serenity of the main room toward the striking red coral installation, where the intense bioluminescent glow washes over the glass railings and decking to create a surreal, otherworldly atmosphere.
